validator_assessment.weakest_link: Single-sector (XLF-only) narrow-breadth leadership combined with sub-conviction ribbon spread (27¢ < 30¢ floor) — the bull thesis collapses without broad sector participation or a clean PMH break.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY rejects premarket high at 680.50 within first hour of RTH and closes below 679.80 — high probability per validator; would confirm range-bound chop, not breakout momentum.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks above PMH 680.50 on volume and reclaims 681.16 (5-day Carry high)

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below PML 678.91 with volume confirmation

invalidation.condition: SPY rejects premarket high at 680.50 within first hour of RTH and closes below 679.80 (validator high-probability scenario)
invalidation.effect: Bull thesis collapses to range-bound chop between 678.91-680.50; ribbon compression (27¢) confirms insufficient momentum for breakout — stand aside until a directional level break fires.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests the battle level at 681.16 at least once within the first 90 minutes of RTH (before 11:00 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not reach 681.00 by 11:00 ET, confirming PMH rejection and range-bound tape

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 20.00 throughout the RTH session, sustaining the MID volatility-compression regime that supports directional call premium
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX spikes above 20.00 within the first 30 minutes of RTH (before 10:00 ET)

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY holds above the slow EMA at 679.45 on any first-hour pullback, confirming the BULL ribbon stack remains intact
swarm_predictions.invalidation: A 5-minute bar closes below 679.45 before 11:30 ET, signaling ribbon stack inversion and momentum loss

synthesis_narrative: All four specialists unanimously favor bulls for 2026-04-10 — CLEAN_BULL ribbon, falling VIX at 18.99, zero macro events, and XLF-led financials driving the tape. However, the thesis is structurally narrow: ribbon spread of 27¢ falls short of the 30¢ conviction floor, XLK is dormant (+0.22%), and XLE is actively diverging (-1.49%), leaving the entire bull case dependent on single-sector financial leadership. The single most important event at RTH open is whether SPY can clear and hold the premarket high at 680.50 — the validator assigns high probability to a rejection there that would confirm range-bound chop rather than breakout momentum; only a clean close above 680.50 with volume opens the path to the battle level at 681.16 and the 682.76 target beyond.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (27¢ spread, fast>pivot>slow), price 46¢ above pivot, 3 consecutive green bars with strong conviction — technically aligned but ribbon spread sub-30¢ conviction floor

macro.one_line: VIX 18.99 falling -2.62% in MID regime with zero macro events today — pure VIX compression tailwind, though ribbon spread flags weak underlying momentum

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 681.16 (Carry ★★) is $1.03 above current price — price in bull-friendly zone above all EMAs, two-level resistance cluster 680.50-681.16 is the filter for the day

internals.one_line: XLF +0.77% leads but XLK flat at +0.22% and XLE -1.49% diverging — narrow rate-sensitive rotation, not broad risk-on; vulnerable to reversal on energy/tech regime shift

validator.top_invalidation: PMH rejection at 680.50 within first RTH hour (high probability) — sub-30¢ ribbon + XLF-only breadth makes the bull move fragile to early mean reversion
